fields.name: CommercialProperty_Attachment_BusinessIncomeExtraExpenseIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates ACORD 810, Business Income / Extra Expense / Rental Value, supplement is attached for this location.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Attachment_ValueReportingIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates ACORD 811, Value Reporting Information, supplement is attached for this location.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Spoilage_YesNoCode_A
fields.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates if spoilage coverage applies.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Spoilage_PropertyDescription_A
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of property to be covered for spoilage.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Spoilage_LimitAmount_A
fields.tooltip: Enter limit: The limit applicable to the spoilage coverage.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Spoilage_DeductibleAmount_A
fields.tooltip: Enter deductible: The deductible applicable to the spoilage coverage.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Spoilage_RefrigeratorMaintenanceCode_A
fields.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates if there is a refrigerator maintenance agreement.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_BreakdownOrContaminationIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that breakdown or contamination coverage exists.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_PowerOutageIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates power outage coverage exists.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_SellingPriceIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates selling price coverage exists on refrigerant equipment.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_OtherIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates other refrigerant equipment coverage exists.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_OptionsDescription_A
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of optional coverages that apply.

fields.name: CommercialPropertyCoverage_SinkHoleCollapse_YesIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that sink hole coverage is accepted.

fields.name: CommercialPropertyCoverage_SinkHoleCollapse_NoIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that sink hole coverage is rejected.

fields.name: CommercialPropertyCoverage_SinkHoleCollapse_LimitAmount_A
fields.tooltip: Enter limit: The limit applicable to the sink hole coverage.

fields.name: CommercialPropertyCoverage_MineSubsidence_YesIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that mine subsidence coverage is accepted.

fields.name: CommercialPropertyCoverage_MineSubsidenceOption_NoIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that mine subsidence coverage is rejected.

fields.name: CommercialPropertyCoverage_MineSubsidence_LimitAmount_A
fields.tooltip: Enter limit: The total limit amount for mine subsidence coverage.

fields.name: BuildingFeatures_HistoricalPropertyIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the property has been designated an historical landmark.

fields.name: Construction_OpenSidesCount_A
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The number of open sides on a structure.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_RemarkText_A
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The remarks associated with a specific location or sublocation.

fields.name: Construction_ConstructionCode_A
fields.tooltip:
Enter code: The primary construction type of the premises. Common construction classifications are:
* Frame
* Joisted Masonry
* Non-Combustible
* Masonry Non-Combustible
* Modified Fire Resistive
* Fire Resistive

fields.name: BuildingFireProtection_HydrantDistanceFeetCount_A
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The distance in feet from the nearest hydrant that supports the protection class used.

fields.name: BuildingFireProtection_FireStationDistanceMileCount_A
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The distance in miles from the nearest fire station that supports the protection class used.

fields.name: BuildingFireProtection_FireDistrictName_A
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The property's fire district name.

fields.name: BuildingFireProtection_FireDistrictCode_A
fields.tooltip: Enter code: The property's fire district code number which can be found in the individual states manual pages.

fields.name: BuildingFireProtection_ProtectionClassCode_A
fields.tooltip: Enter code: The fire rating protection class for this location.  Note: some structures may be located too far from the nearest hydrant, or too far from the nearest fire station, for the protection class of the community to apply.

fields.name: Construction_StoreyCount_A
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The number of stories or floors for this building not including any basement.

fields.name: Construction_BasementCount_A
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The number of basements for this building.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_BuiltYear_A
fields.tooltip: Enter year: The year the building at each location was originally constructed. Specify in the Remarks section any significant additions or renovations and the year they were completed.

fields.name: Construction_BuildingArea_A
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The number of square feet of the building at this location for which insurance is being requested.

fields.name: BuildingImprovement_WiringIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if any wiring improvements have been made since the original construction.

fields.name: BuildingImprovement_WiringYear_A
fields.tooltip: Enter year: The year the wiring improvements took place.

fields.name: BuildingImprovement_RoofingIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if any roofing improvements have been made since the original construction.

fields.name: BuildingImprovement_RoofingYear_A
fields.tooltip: Enter year: The year the roofing improvements took place.

fields.name: BuildingImprovement_PlumbingIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if any plumbing improvements have been made since the original construction.

fields.name: BuildingImprovement_PlumbingYear_A
fields.tooltip: Enter year: The year the plumbing improvements took place.

fields.name: BuildingImprovement_HeatingIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if any heating improvements have been made since the original construction.

fields.name: BuildingImprovement_HeatingYear_A
fields.tooltip: Enter year: The year the heating improvements took place.

fields.name: BuildingImprovement_OtherIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if any other improvements have been made since the original construction.

fields.name: BuildingImprovement_OtherDescription_A
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of other improvements that have been made to the structure.

fields.name: BuildingImprovement_OtherYear_A
fields.tooltip: Enter year: The year the other improvements took place.

fields.name: Construction_BuildingCodeEffectivenessGradeCode_A
fields.tooltip: Enter code: The industry code used to collect the building code effectiveness grade code. The source of this code list is public protection classification or individual insurer rating manuals.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_TaxCode_A
fields.tooltip: Enter code: The city, county or state tax code, if applicable.

fields.name: Construction_RoofMaterialCode_A
fields.tooltip:
Enter code: The material used to construct the roof.  Examples include:
  * Composition (fiberglass, asphalt, etc.)
  * Metal
  * Poured
  * Slate
  * Tile
  * Wood Shake
(Please note this list is not all inclusive)

fields.name: BuildingOccupancy_OtherOccupanciesDescription_A
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of any other occupancies located in the building not operated by the insured and not listed in the Description of Operations section on the ACORD 125.  If no other occupancy, enter None.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_WindClass_ResistiveIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the wind class is resistive.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_WindClass_SemiResistiveIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the wind class is semi-resistive.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_WindClass_OtherIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the wind class is other than those listed.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_WindClass_OtherDescription_A
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the other wind class.

fields.name: BuildingFeatures_SolidFuelHeaterIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the presence of a solid fuel heater such as a wood burning stove or fireplace insert.

fields.name: BuildingFeatures_SolidFuelHeaterInstallationDate_A
fields.tooltip: Enter date: The installation date of the solid fuel heater.

fields.name: BuildingFeatures_SolidFuelHeaterManufacturerName_A
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The manufacturer of the solid fuel heater.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_PrimaryHeat_BoilerIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if a boiler is the primary heating on the premises.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_HeatingBoilerInsuredElsewhereCode_A
fields.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates if the heating boiler is insured elsewhere.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_PrimaryHeat_SolidFuelIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if solid fuel is the primary heating on the premises.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_PrimaryHeat_OtherIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates primary heating source is other than those listed.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_PrimaryHeat_OtherDescription_A
fields.tooltip: Enter text: If applicable, describe the other primary heat source.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_SecondaryHeat_BoilerIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if a boiler is the secondary heating on the premises.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_HeatingBoilerInsuredElsewhereCode_B
fields.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates if the heating boiler is insured elsewhere.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_SecondaryHeat_SolidFuelIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if solid fuel is the secondary heating on the premises.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_SecondaryHeat_OtherIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates secondary heating source is other than those listed.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_SecondaryHeat_OtherDescription_A
fields.tooltip: Enter text: If applicable, describe the other secondary heat source.

fields.name: BuildingExposure_RightDescription_A
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the buildings, structures, activities conducted, or use of the adjacent property to the right of the insured premises.

fields.name: BuildingExposure_RightDistance_A
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The distance to the adjacent exposure on the right of the insured premises in linear feet.

fields.name: BuildingExposure_LeftDescription_A
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the buildings, structures, activities conducted, or use of the adjacent property to the left of the insured premises.

fields.name: BuildingExposure_LeftDistance_A
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The distance to the adjacent exposure on the left of the insured premises in linear feet.

fields.name: BuildingExposure_FrontDescription_A
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the buildings, structures, activities conducted, or use of the adjacent property to the front of the insured premises.

fields.name: BuildingExposure_FrontDistance_A
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The distance to the adjacent exposure in the front of the insured premises in linear feet.

fields.name: BuildingExposure_RearDescription_A
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the buildings, structures, activities conducted, or use of the adjacent property to the rear of the insured premises.

fields.name: BuildingExposure_RearDistance_A
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The distance to the adjacent exposure in the rear of the insured premises in linear feet.

fields.name: Alarm_Burglar_AlarmDescription_A
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of any burglar alarm protecting the building or contents. Descriptive terms such as safe, premises, perimeter, or ultrasonic may be suitable.

fields.name: Alarm_Burglar_CertificateIdentifier_A
fields.tooltip: Enter identifier: The Underwriters Laboratories or other testing organization Certificate Number, if applicable. Attach a copy of the certificate to the application.

fields.name: Alarm_Burglar_CertificateExpirationDate_A
fields.tooltip: Enter date: The expiration date of the certificate.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

fields.name: Alarm_Burglar_CentralStationIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the burglar alarm rings at an alarm company.

fields.name: Alarm_Burglar_WithKeysIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the alarm company, located off the insured's premises, has keys to the applicant's property.

fields.name: Burglar_LocalGongIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the burglar alarm rings on audible gong located outside the building.

fields.name: Alarm_Burglar_InstalledAndServicedByName_A
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The name of the alarm company that installed and services the alarm.  Alarm companies often install, maintain, and service the system in addition to providing Central Station facilities.

fields.name: Alarm_Burglar_ProtectionExtentCode_A
fields.tooltip: Enter code: The designated extent of protection as described in the Underwriters Laboratories (UL) standard.

fields.name: Alarm_Burglar_GradeCode_A
fields.tooltip: Enter code: The alarm system grade as described in the Underwriters Laboratories (UL) standard (i.e., AA, A, BB, B, CC and C) which indicates the time required to respond to a signal from the alarm system.

fields.name: BuildingSecurity_GuardWatchmenCount_A
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The number of guards and or watchmen employed or contracted for by the insured.

fields.name: BuildingSecurity_GuardWatchmenClockHourlyIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the guard / watchman is required to make hourly rounds using a special time recording device or in connection with the central station service.  If other than hourly, indicate the time interval in the Other box.

fields.name: BuildingSecurity_GuardWatchmenOtherIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the guard / watchman is required to make some other type of rounds.

fields.name: BuildingSecurity_GuardWatchmenOtherDescription_A
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the rounds the guards / watchmen are required to make.

fields.name: BuildingFireProtection_Alarm_ProtectionDescription_A
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the type of fire protection for the premises (e.g. sprinklers, standpipes, chemical systems).

fields.name: BuildingFireProtection_Alarm_SprinklerPercent_A
fields.tooltip: Enter percentage: The percentage of the structure area covered by the sprinkler system.

fields.name: BuildingFireProtection_Alarm_ManufacturerName_A
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The name of the manufacturer of the alarm, and if it is UL listed.

fields.name: BuildingFireProtection_Alarm_CentralStationIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the fire alarm rings at an alarm company, police department or fire department.

fields.name: BuildingFireProtection_Alarm_LocalGongIndicator_A
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the fire alarm rings on an audible gong located outside of the building.

fields.name: AdditionalInterest_Item_OtherItemDescription_A
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the item which has an additional interest.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_Location_ProducerIdentifier_B
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The location number for the premises.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_PhysicalAddress_LineOne_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The first address line of the commercial structure.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_Building_ProducerIdentifier_B
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The building number for the premises.  Used when more than one building exists at an individual location.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_Building_SublocationDescription_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: This describes the particular sublocation in a manner sufficient to distinguish it from other sublocations at a given location.  An example might be "3 story blue structure on the left of the main building".

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_SubjectOfInsuranceCode_G
fields.tooltip:
Enter code: The code designating all unit at risk / coverages that are to be insured at this particular location number / building number combination.

Examples:

B - Building
BUSEE - Business Income without Extra Expense
BUSIN - Business Income with Extra Expense
BUSER - Business Income with Extra Expense and Rental Value  
BUSRN - Business Income with Rental Value without Extra Expense
BPP - Business Personal Property 
EE - Extra Expense 
FF - Furniture & Fixtures 
MACEQ - Machinery, Equipment 
PP - Personal Property 
POTOP - Property of Others 
STK - Stock

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_LimitAmount_G
fields.tooltip: Enter limit: The maximum amount of coverage provided for this subject of insurance or premium-bearing option.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_CoinsurancePercent_G
fields.tooltip: Enter percentage: The Coinsurance Percentage is the percentage of the total value of the subject of insurance being insured.  If the amount of insurance falls below this percentage, the insured must share in the amount of the loss.  This field should be completed even when writing agreed amount coverage.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_ValuationCode_G
fields.tooltip:
Enter code: Indicate the method which will be used to determine the amount paid on a claim.  If other valuation basis applies, provide necessary information.

Example valuation methods are:

A -  Actual Cash Value
R  - Replacement Cost
V -  Agreed Amount
M - Market Value

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_CauseOfLossCode_G
fields.tooltip:
Enter code: The causes of loss the subject of insurance is to be covered for.  Examples:
  * Basic
  * Broad
  * Special excluding theft
  * Earthquake

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_InflationGuardPercent_G
fields.tooltip: Enter percentage: The inflation guard percentage gives an automatic increase in the amount of coverage based on a percentage over time.  List both the percentage amount and the period of time during which it applies (e.g., 4% per year).

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_DeductibleAmount_G
fields.tooltip: Enter deductible: The deductible amount that is to apply to this subject of insurance.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_DeductibleTypeCode_G
fields.tooltip: Enter code: The code indicating the type of deductible that is to apply to this subject of insurance.  Examples are percent, dollars and number of days.  "Number of days" is used to describe the waiting period (deductible) for business income.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_BlanketNumber_G
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The identifying number for the blanket under which this subject of insurance is rated.  Leave blank if the subject of insurance is not included under a blanket.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_FormsAndConditions_G
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The form numbers and special conditions that apply to this subject of insurance.  Also indicate here if coverage is blanket or average rated.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Attachment_BusinessIncomeExtraExpenseIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates ACORD 810, Business Income / Extra Expense / Rental Value, supplement is attached for this location.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Attachment_ValueReportingIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates ACORD 811, Value Reporting Information, supplement is attached for this location.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Spoilage_YesNoCode_B
fields.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates if spoilage coverage applies.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Spoilage_PropertyDescription_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of property to be covered for spoilage.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Spoilage_LimitAmount_B
fields.tooltip: Enter limit: The limit applicable to the spoilage coverage.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Spoilage_DeductibleAmount_B
fields.tooltip: Enter deductible: The deductible applicable to the spoilage coverage.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Spoilage_RefrigeratorMaintenanceCode_B
fields.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates if there is a refrigerator maintenance agreement.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_BreakdownOrContaminationIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that breakdown or contamination coverage exists.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_PowerOutageIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates power outage coverage exists.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_SellingPriceIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates selling price coverage exists on refrigerant equipment.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_OtherIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates other refrigerant equipment coverage exists.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_OptionsDescription_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of optional coverages that apply.

fields.name: CommercialPropertyCoverage_SinkHoleCollapse_YesIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that sink hole coverage is accepted.

fields.name: CommercialPropertyCoverage_SinkHoleCollapse_NoIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that sink hole coverage is rejected.

fields.name: CommercialPropertyCoverage_SinkHoleCollapse_LimitAmount_B
fields.tooltip: Enter limit: The limit applicable to the sink hole coverage.

fields.name: CommercialPropertyCoverage_MineSubsidence_YesIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that mine subsidence coverage is accepted.

fields.name: CommercialPropertyCoverage_MineSubsidenceOption_NoIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that mine subsidence coverage is rejected.

fields.name: CommercialPropertyCoverage_MineSubsidence_LimitAmount_B
fields.tooltip: Enter limit: The total limit amount for mine subsidence coverage.

fields.name: BuildingFeatures_HistoricalPropertyIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the property has been designated an historical landmark.

fields.name: Construction_OpenSidesCount_B
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The number of open sides on a structure.

fields.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_RemarkText_C
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The remarks associated with a specific location or sublocation.

fields.name: Construction_ConstructionCode_B
fields.tooltip:
Enter code: The primary construction type of the premises. Common construction classifications are:
* Frame
* Joisted Masonry
* Non-Combustible
* Masonry Non-Combustible
* Modified Fire Resistive
* Fire Resistive

fields.name: BuildingFireProtection_HydrantDistanceFeetCount_B
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The distance in feet from the nearest hydrant that supports the protection class used.

fields.name: BuildingFireProtection_FireStationDistanceMileCount_B
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The distance in miles from the nearest fire station that supports the protection class used.

fields.name: BuildingFireProtection_FireDistrictName_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The property's fire district name.

fields.name: BuildingFireProtection_FireDistrictCode_B
fields.tooltip: Enter code: The property's fire district code number which can be found in the individual states manual pages.

fields.name: BuildingFireProtection_ProtectionClassCode_B
fields.tooltip: Enter code: The fire rating protection class for this location.  Note: some structures may be located too far from the nearest hydrant, or too far from the nearest fire station, for the protection class of the community to apply.

fields.name: Construction_StoreyCount_B
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The number of stories or floors for this building not including any basement.

fields.name: Construction_BasementCount_B
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The number of basements for this building.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_BuiltYear_B
fields.tooltip: Enter year: The year the building at each location was originally constructed. Specify in the Remarks section any significant additions or renovations and the year they were completed.

fields.name: Construction_BuildingArea_B
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The number of square feet of the building at this location for which insurance is being requested.

fields.name: BuildingImprovement_WiringIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if any wiring improvements have been made since the original construction.

fields.name: BuildingImprovement_WiringYear_B
fields.tooltip: Enter year: The year the wiring improvements took place.

fields.name: BuildingImprovement_RoofingIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if any roofing improvements have been made since the original construction.

fields.name: BuildingImprovement_RoofingYear_B
fields.tooltip: Enter year: The year the roofing improvements took place.

fields.name: BuildingImprovement_PlumbingIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if any plumbing improvements have been made since the original construction.

fields.name: BuildingImprovement_PlumbingYear_B
fields.tooltip: Enter year: The year the plumbing improvements took place.

fields.name: BuildingImprovement_HeatingIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if any heating improvements have been made since the original construction.

fields.name: BuildingImprovement_HeatingYear_B
fields.tooltip: Enter year: The year the heating improvements took place.

fields.name: BuildingImprovement_OtherIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if any other improvements have been made since the original construction.

fields.name: BuildingImprovement_OtherDescription_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of other improvements that have been made to the structure.

fields.name: BuildingImprovement_OtherYear_B
fields.tooltip: Enter year: The year the other improvements took place.

fields.name: Construction_BuildingCodeEffectivenessGradeCode_B
fields.tooltip: Enter code: The industry code used to collect the building code effectiveness grade code. The source of this code list is public protection classification or individual insurer rating manuals.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_TaxCode_B
fields.tooltip: Enter code: The city, county or state tax code, if applicable.

fields.name: Construction_RoofMaterialCode_B
fields.tooltip:
Enter code: The material used to construct the roof.  Examples include:
  * Composition (fiberglass, asphalt, etc.)
  * Metal
  * Poured
  * Slate
  * Tile
  * Wood Shake
(Please note this list is not all inclusive)

fields.name: BuildingOccupancy_OtherOccupanciesDescription_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of any other occupancies located in the building not operated by the insured and not listed in the Description of Operations section on the ACORD 125.  If no other occupancy, enter None.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_WindClass_ResistiveIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the wind class is resistive.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_WindClass_SemiResistiveIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the wind class is semi-resistive.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_WindClass_OtherIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the wind class is other than those listed.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_WindClass_OtherDescription_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the other wind class.

fields.name: BuildingFeatures_SolidFuelHeaterIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the presence of a solid fuel heater such as a wood burning stove or fireplace insert.

fields.name: BuildingFeatures_SolidFuelHeaterInstallationDate_B
fields.tooltip: Enter date: The installation date of the solid fuel heater.

fields.name: BuildingFeatures_SolidFuelHeaterManufacturerName_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The manufacturer of the solid fuel heater.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_PrimaryHeat_BoilerIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if a boiler is the primary heating on the premises.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_HeatingBoilerInsuredElsewhereCode_C
fields.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates if the heating boiler is insured elsewhere.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_PrimaryHeat_SolidFuelIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if solid fuel is the primary heating on the premises.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_PrimaryHeat_OtherIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates primary heating source is other than those listed.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_PrimaryHeat_OtherDescription_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: If applicable, describe the other primary heat source.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_SecondaryHeat_BoilerIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if a boiler is the secondary heating on the premises.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_HeatingBoilerInsuredElsewhereCode_D
fields.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates if the heating boiler is insured elsewhere.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_SecondaryHeat_SolidFuelIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if solid fuel is the secondary heating on the premises.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_SecondaryHeat_OtherIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates secondary heating source is other than those listed.

fields.name: CommercialStructure_SecondaryHeat_OtherDescription_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: If applicable, describe the other secondary heat source.

fields.name: BuildingExposure_RightDescription_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the buildings, structures, activities conducted, or use of the adjacent property to the right of the insured premises.

fields.name: BuildingExposure_RightDistance_B
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The distance to the adjacent exposure on the right of the insured premises in linear feet.

fields.name: BuildingExposure_LeftDescription_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the buildings, structures, activities conducted, or use of the adjacent property to the left of the insured premises.

fields.name: BuildingExposure_LeftDistance_B
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The distance to the adjacent exposure on the left of the insured premises in linear feet.

fields.name: BuildingExposure_FrontDescription_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the buildings, structures, activities conducted, or use of the adjacent property to the front of the insured premises.

fields.name: BuildingExposure_FrontDistance_B
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The distance to the adjacent exposure in the front of the insured premises in linear feet.

fields.name: BuildingExposure_RearDescription_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the buildings, structures, activities conducted, or use of the adjacent property to the rear of the insured premises.

fields.name: BuildingExposure_RearDistance_B
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The distance to the adjacent exposure in the rear of the insured premises in linear feet.

fields.name: Alarm_Burglar_AlarmDescription_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of any burglar alarm protecting the building or contents. Descriptive terms such as safe, premises, perimeter, or ultrasonic may be suitable.

fields.name: Alarm_Burglar_CertificateIdentifier_B
fields.tooltip: Enter identifier: The Underwriters Laboratories or other testing organization Certificate Number, if applicable. Attach a copy of the certificate to the application.

fields.name: Alarm_Burglar_CertificateExpirationDate_B
fields.tooltip: Enter date: The expiration date of the certificate.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

fields.name: Alarm_Burglar_CentralStationIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the burglar alarm rings at an alarm company.

fields.name: Alarm_Burglar_WithKeysIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the alarm company, located off the insured's premises, has keys to the applicant's property.

fields.name: Burglar_LocalGongIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the burglar alarm rings on audible gong located outside the building.

fields.name: Alarm_Burglar_InstalledAndServicedByName_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The name of the alarm company that installed and services the alarm.  Alarm companies often install, maintain, and service the system in addition to providing Central Station facilities.

fields.name: Alarm_Burglar_ProtectionExtentCode_B
fields.tooltip: Enter code: The designated extent of protection as described in the Underwriters Laboratories (UL) standard.

fields.name: Alarm_Burglar_GradeCode_B
fields.tooltip: Enter code: The alarm system grade as described in the Underwriters Laboratories (UL) standard (i.e., AA, A, BB, B, CC and C) which indicates the time required to respond to a signal from the alarm system.

fields.name: BuildingSecurity_GuardWatchmenCount_B
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The number of guards and or watchmen employed or contracted for by the insured.

fields.name: BuildingSecurity_GuardWatchmenClockHourlyIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the guard / watchman is required to make hourly rounds using a special time recording device or in connection with the central station service.  If other than hourly, indicate the time interval in the Other box.

fields.name: BuildingSecurity_GuardWatchmenOtherIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the guard / watchman is required to make some other type of rounds.

fields.name: BuildingSecurity_GuardWatchmenOtherDescription_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the rounds the guards / watchmen are required to make.

fields.name: BuildingFireProtection_Alarm_ProtectionDescription_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the type of fire protection for the premises (e.g. sprinklers, standpipes, chemical systems).

fields.name: BuildingFireProtection_Alarm_SprinklerPercent_B
fields.tooltip: Enter percentage: The percentage of the structure area covered by the sprinkler system.

fields.name: BuildingFireProtection_Alarm_ManufacturerName_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The name of the manufacturer of the alarm, and if it is UL listed.

fields.name: BuildingFireProtection_Alarm_CentralStationIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the fire alarm rings at an alarm company, police department or fire department.

fields.name: BuildingFireProtection_Alarm_LocalGongIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the fire alarm rings on an audible gong located outside of the building.

fields.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Attachment_AdditionalInterestIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that further additional interests appear on the attached ACORD 45.

fields.name: AdditionalInterest_Interest_LendersLossPayableIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the additional interest type is a lender's loss payable.

fields.name: AdditionalInterest_Interest_LossPayeeIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the additional interest type is a loss payee.

fields.name: AdditionalInterest_Interest_MortgageeIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the additional interest type is a mortgagee.

fields.name: AdditionalInterest_Interest_OtherIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the additional interest is other than those listed.

fields.name: AdditionalInterest_Interest_OtherDescription_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the other type of additional interest.

fields.name: AdditionalInterest_InterestRank_B
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The ranking of 'this' additional interest when multiple additional interests are associated with the same item.

fields.name: AdditionalInterest_CertificateRequiredIndicator_B
fields.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if the additional interest requires a Certificate of Insurance.

fields.name: AdditionalInterest_MailingAddress_LineOne_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The additional interest's mailing address line one.

fields.name: AdditionalInterest_MailingAddress_LineTwo_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The additional interest's mailing address line two.

fields.name: AdditionalInterest_MailingAddress_CityName_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The additional interest's mailing address city name.

fields.name: AdditionalInterest_MailingAddress_StateOrProvinceCode_B
fields.tooltip: Enter code: The additional interest's mailing address state or province code.

fields.name: AdditionalInterest_MailingAddress_PostalCode_B
fields.tooltip: Enter code: The additional interest's mailing address postal code.

fields.name: AdditionalInterest_MailingAddress_CountryCode_B
fields.tooltip: Enter code: The additional interest's country code.

fields.name: AdditionalInterest_AccountNumberIdentifier_B
fields.tooltip: Enter identifier: The loan number, account number or other controlling number that the additional interest may have assigned the insured.

fields.name: AdditionalInterest_Item_LocationProducerIdentifier_B
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The producer assigned number of the location which has an additional interest.

fields.name: AdditionalInterest_Item_BuildingProducerIdentifier_B
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The producer assigned number of the building which has an additional interest.

fields.name: AdditionalInterest_Item_OtherItemDescription_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the item which has an additional interest.

fields.name: AdditionalInterest_Item_ScheduledItemProducerIdentifier_B
fields.tooltip: Enter number: The producer assigned number of the scheduled item which has an additional interest.

fields.name: AdditionalInterest_ItemDescription_B
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the item of interest if needed to further clarify.  For a vehicle, list the make, model and VIN number.  For a scheduled item, list the description, such as three carat diamond in six point setting.

fields.name: CommercialPropertyLineOfBusiness_RemarkText_A
fields.tooltip: Enter text: The remarks associated the commercial property line of business.
